mentions.note: GLP-1 pill formulation removes injection barriers; $149 pricing unlocks 85M unmet US obesity cases; rare disease pipeline (sickle cell, hemophilia) launching end of 2026.
Oral GLP-1 pill head start vs. Eli Lily's spring launch; CEO meeting positive; making a turn; hold existing position, don't add.
GLP-1 first-mover advantage and attractive valuation, but Eli Lilly's execution superior; hold vs. LILLI strong preference; upgrade if/when pill form launches.
First-mover pill advantage despite near-term guidance miss; pricing cuts on injectables offset by Rybelsus phenomenal uptake (170k Americans in 4 weeks).

CEO Mike Dustar: pill ramp phenomenal (50k Rx/week, 170k Americans in 4 weeks); pricing cuts on injectables offsetting; higher-dose semaglutide matching Lily efficacy; supply chain ready unlike injection days.
Good at cutting prices but not making drugs; prefer Eli Lilly for drug development; price-cutting risk outweighs upside.
Avoid. Eli Lilly winning GLP-1 pill share battle; Novo Nordisk will lose significant market share.
Not good at what they do; avoid. Prefer J&J for healthcare exposure.
